flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at NHTI-Concord's Community College fell 31% between 2006 and 2009 (30.8% → 21.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at NHTI-Concord's Community College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4k → 2.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at NHTI-Concord's Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at NHTI-Concord's Community College rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 (53.1% → 69.2%).
